name: Octogenarian and The 90s
overview: When her grandmother falls ill, Ye Xiaomei inherits Sunshine Home, a lively nursing home, and clashes with slick salesman Guo Sanshuang. Amid their conflicts, the two bring new energy to the residents and discover the touching stories that unite them all.

trailers.title: 重磅! 八零九零最新“老有所乐”定档预告: 白敬亭吴倩成100岁幼儿园“小家长” ，欢喜冤家竟被强行配对 | 八零九零 Octogenarian and The 90S | 白敬亭 吴倩 倪大红
